title: Where Is Thandi?
synopsis: Baby Thandi plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout their cozy home. Each page reveals Thandi hiding behind curtains, under blankets, and in various spots while her grandmother, father, and mother search for her with joy and laughter.

illustration.description: A warm living room with soft peach walls and gentle sunlight streaming through windows. Colorful toys scattered on a plush cream rug. In the center, flowing yellow curtains sway gently, with tiny brown feet peeking out underneath.
illustration.alt: Yellow curtains with small feet visible underneath

illustration.description: Thandi, a joyful toddler with bouncy black curls and sparkling brown eyes, pops out from behind bright yellow curtains with her arms spread wide. She wears a soft pink dress and has the biggest smile. Warm golden light creates a magical glow around her.
illustration.alt: Happy toddler Thandi emerging from behind yellow curtains

illustration.description: A cozy kitchen with mint green cabinets and wooden counters. Thandi's grandmother, an elegant woman with silver braids and warm brown skin, looks around with a playful expression. A colorful striped kitchen towel hangs nearby, slightly moving as if someone is hiding behind it.
illustration.alt: Grandmother searching in kitchen with towel moving mysteriously

illustration.description: Thandi peeks out from under the red and white striped kitchen towel, her eyes twinkling with mischief. Grandmother claps her hands in delight, both sharing a moment of pure joy. The kitchen glows with warm afternoon light and love.
illustration.alt: Thandi hiding under kitchen towel while grandmother claps happily

illustration.description: The living room again, now with Thandi's father, a tall man with kind eyes and short black hair, looking around with exaggerated surprise. A soft lavender blanket on the sofa has a suspicious little bump that wiggles slightly.
illustration.alt: Father searching while blanket on sofa shows a small wiggling bump

illustration.description: Thandi bursts out from under the soft lavender blanket with pure delight, her curls bouncing. Father scoops her up with gentle hands, both laughing together. The sofa cushions are plump and inviting, creating a safe, cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Thandi popping out of blanket as father reaches to pick her up

illustration.description: Thandi's mother, a beautiful woman with long black hair in a colorful headwrap, searches near a bookshelf filled with bright children's books. Behind a large potted plant with broad green leaves, tiny fingers can be seen wiggling playfully.
illustration.alt: Mother searching near bookshelf while small fingers show behind plant

illustration.description: Thandi emerges from behind the leafy green plant, leaves gently falling around her like confetti. Mother opens her arms wide with the warmest smile. The room is filled with soft golden light, books, and the feeling of endless love and play.
illustration.alt: Thandi coming out from behind plant as mother opens arms welcomingly

pages.text: There's our Thandi! We love you!

illustration.description: All four family members embrace in a gentle group hug in the center of their warm living room. Thandi is in the middle, surrounded by grandmother, father, and mother. Soft pastel colors create a dreamy, loving atmosphere with toys and books scattered around them.
illustration.alt: Family of four in loving group hug in cozy living room

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Where did Thandi first hide?
questions.explanation: Thandi first hid behind the yellow curtains in the living room.

questions.question: Who found Thandi in the kitchen?
questions.explanation: Grandmother found Thandi hiding under the kitchen towel.

questions.question: What sound did Thandi make when she wiggled?
questions.explanation: When Thandi was under the blanket, the story says 'Wiggle wiggle!'
